MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

CROSS DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S Motion To Compel Responses Without Objections

Motion to compel GRANTED. No timely opposition filed. Complete responses, without objections, due within 7 court days of notice of entry.

The prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312 by e-mail to the Judge Pro Tem Scott Borrowman at sborrowman@gmail.com.
